introSection: Energuś Roller Coaster is a steel roller coaster located at Energylandia in Zator, Małopolskie, Poland.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: Energuś Roller Coaster is one of Vekoma's 335m Roller Skater installations. This is the largest Junior Coaster version Vekoma offers.

fullText:
Energuś Roller Coaster is a steel roller coaster located at Energylandia in Zator, Małopolskie, Poland.

Energuś Roller Coaster is one of Vekoma's 335m Roller Skater installations. This is the largest Junior Coaster version Vekoma offers.
